title: pi memory CLI — list / forget / pin / why subcommands
resolution: scripts/memory_cli.py created with 4 subcommands (list, forget, pin, why). Standalone argparse script — no PiAgent instantiation, direct sqlite3. --god flag requires PI_GOD_CLI=1 env; either alone refuses. cmd_forget uses word-overlap scoring to find top-3 candidates before confirm. cmd_pin sets importance=10 (and pinned=1 if column exists — graceful no-op when pre-T-135). cmd_why prints full metadata trace with all l3_cache columns. testing/test_memory_cli.py: 17 tests across all subcommands. verify.py PASS.
